'''鈭歴h-y-h-d''' ('''kashayhedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:volunteer|volunteer]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-y-h-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:volunteer|volunteer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-y-h-d
|-
! Lemma
| kashayhedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishayhedoko|thishayhedoko]] || [[word:jishayhedoko|jishayhedoko]] || [[word:shishayhedoko|shishayhedoko]] || [[word:kishayhedoko|kishayhedoko]]
